== Notes for [[Item:Q87839|Q87839]] ==

Rufus meant "Red" referring to the red hair of his family lineage.

--------------------

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=elacey1&id=I41897

•ID: I41897 •Name: Eneius Octavius Chancellor of the Republic RUFUS •Sex: M •Birth: in Living about 330 BC •Change Date: 19 NOV 2003 at 06:56:07

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown Children 1. Caius OCTAVIUS I
--------------------
Chancellor of the Republic of Rome: Rufus meant "Red" referring to the red hair of his family lineage.


wtf 4:565 Enus Octavius Rufus

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
